creator: phryk-ports@wzff.de
text:
Trying to build www/grafana7 from 2021Q1 quarterly ports branch fails with a checksum mismatch for `grafana-loki-v1.6.0_GH0.tar.gz`.

This sort of thing seems to have been an issue before, see: https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=251289

As this time again, there's a newer version of www/grafana7 in HEAD, I'd expect just bumping that into the quarterlies is going to fix the issue again.
